name: last30days-skill
description: 8-source social trend aggregator covering Reddit, Hacker News, Polymarket, X/Twitter, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and web search. Zero pip dependencies. Free-tier sources work out of the box; full coverage needs API keys (all documented).
review: Production-grade 8-source social trend aggregator with exceptional documentation, clean security posture, zero pip deps, and active daily maintenance. Free-tier sources (Reddit, HN, Polymarket) work out of the box; full multi-platform coverage gated on API keys, all clearly documented. Nothing comparable in the ProSkills catalog.

drax_results.notes: Core engine + free-tier sources verified. Full coverage requires API keys (documented). Mock mode works.
